phase_boundary: A/B — this batch spans the Phase A/B transition (triage-designated boundary batch)
batch_notes: Phase A/B boundary batch per triage. Sequential block ROW-7806-7867 covers May 22-Jun 10; parallel block ROW-9607-9762 covers May 7-Jun 10 with additional unique content. RF-04 primary event at end of batch (Jun 7-8 harm allegation cluster).

batch_summary.dominant_tone: predominantly cooperative with major RF-04+RF-15+RF-11 event at end of batch period; May 5-Jun 6 largely cooperative (counseling disclosure, new partner introduction, logistics, shared parenting positive moments); Jun 7-8 triggers multi-allegation child relay cluster when Olivia returns from Eli's; Abby-as-harmful-actor framing introduced as new vector
batch_summary.rf04_activity: moderate — 1 Sev-2 primary (Jun 7-8 child relay harm allegation cluster); May 27 car-safety fear relay peripheral (ARC-RF04-002); Jun 7-8 adds 'asshole' ADD-002, DARVO, Abby-as-harmful-actor framing, child-harm-fear relay; COMP-RF04-021 (RF-04+RF-15+RF-11)
batch_summary.notable_context: May 19: Melissa discloses Olivia has started counseling — cooperative. May 21 minor friction: Melissa sends message 'Cause that seems like something that the two parents should know about / But you do you boo' (ROW-9654-9655) after Eli redirects to text. May 28: New partner discussion — Melissa informs Eli about man she is dating; invokes parenting plan 9-month rule (cooperative). May 27: ROW-9692-9693 — child car-safety fear relay: Olivia asked Melissa to track her location 'cause my dads always crashing his cars' — peripheral ARC-RF04-002 signal. Jun 7-8 cluster (ROW-9735-9751): Olivia returns and Melissa deploys child relay multi-allegation: vaping in front of Olivia (ROW-9735), threatened to pinch (ROW-9735), Abby laughed at coughing (ROW-9736), no dinner given (ROW-9737), Abby pinches Milo (ROW-9738), Olivia 'felt like you were going to hurt her' (ROW-9739), vaping while child has asthma (ROW-9744), 'asshole' Abby-causal-attribution (ROW-9750), DARVO dismissal (ROW-9751). New Abby-as-harmful-actor vector established.

primary_flags.summary: Jun 7-8 child relay harm allegation cluster. Context: Olivia returns from Eli's on Saturday and Melissa relays multi-allegation harm report. ROW-9735: 'Olivia said you vaped in front of her and threatened to pinch her' — two-allegation delivery: (1) vaping exposure (child has asthma per ROW-9744); (2) physical threat allegation ('threatened to pinch her'). ROW-9736: 'She said that Abby laughed at her for coughing' — Abby-as-harmful-actor framing; Abby positioned as deriving satisfaction from child's respiratory distress. ROW-9737: 'And you didn't give her dinner' — parenting inadequacy allegation. ROW-9738: 'And Abby pinches Milo' — Abby physical conduct toward Milo introduced as corroborating context for Abby-harm framing. ROW-9739: 'She said she felt like you were going to hurt her cause I asked if you were just joking. That's when she said that she thought you'd do it because Abby does it.' — child's fear of harm by Eli escalated and anchored to Abby as behavioral model ('because Abby does it'); links alleged threat behavior to existing Abby-pinching characterization. ROW-9744: 'Normal parenting choices should not involve threatening to hurt her and making her scared or valing around her when she has asthma.' — parenting judgment framing; 'making her scared' escalates from allegation to characterization. ROW-9750: 'You and Abby must be arguing cause you act like an asshole everytime you are' — ADD-002 slur ('asshole') + Abby-causal-attribution: Eli's conduct reframed as Abby-conflict spillover. ROW-9751: 'I never said Abby abused anyone. I simply told you what Olivia said so that you knew and could respond. Seems like you are very defensive for someone who didn't do any wrong.' — DARVO: Eli's denial of allegations reframed as suspicious defensiveness. COMP-RF04-021 (RF-04+RF-15+RF-11). ARC-RF04-001-S60; ARC-RF04-002-S19. Continuation of physical-harm allegation trajectory: Sep 15 choking claim (B-019) → Oct 3 DV false allegation (B-019) → Jun 7 vaping+threat+harm-fear relay (B-025).
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-9735 (Received): "Olivia said you vaped in front of her and threatened to pinch her"
ROW-9736 (Received): "She said that Abby laughed at her for coughing"
ROW-9739 (Received): "She said she felt like you were going to hurt her cause I asked if you were just joking. That's when she said that she thought you'd do it because Abby does it."
ROW-9744 (Received): "Normal parenting choices should not involve threatening to hurt her and making her scared or valing around her when she has asthma."
ROW-9750 (Received): "You and Abby must be arguing cause you act like an asshole everytime you are"
ROW-9751 (Received): "I never said Abby abused anyone. I simply told you what Olivia said so that you knew and could respond. Seems like you are very defensive for someone who didn't do any wrong."

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-9692: 'She said cause my dads always crashing his cars and I wanted to make sure you could see where I was' — Melissa relays Olivia's request for location tracking; 'always crashing his cars' mischaracterizes two accidents Eli states were not his fault (ROW-7824: 'I was hit and neither were my fault'). ROW-9693: 'She was afraid you were going to wreck your car with her in it' — child's safety fear relayed as unsafe-driver framing. Pattern-note: car-danger framing is distinct from prior physical harm vectors; watch for recurrence in later batches.

ROW-9654: 'Cause that seems like something that the two parents should know about' — parenting-expectation assertion after Eli redirected Melissa to text. ROW-9655: 'But you do you boo' — contemptuous dismissal phrase; low-severity standalone. No escalation.

new_signals.summary: Jun 7-8 child relay harm allegation cluster: vaping + physical threat + Abby-laughing-at-coughing + no dinner + Abby-pinches-Milo (ROW-9735-9738) + Olivia 'felt like you were going to hurt her / because Abby does it' (ROW-9739) + 'asshole' ADD-002 + Abby-causal-attribution (ROW-9750) + DARVO 'very defensive for someone who didn't do any wrong' (ROW-9751). COMP-RF04-021 (RF-04+RF-15+RF-11). Physical-harm allegation trajectory: choking claim B-019 → vaping/threat/harm-fear relay B-025.

Child used as harm-allegation delivery vehicle: Olivia's reported experiences (vaping, threat, fear) relayed through Melissa; escalates with Olivia's fear framing ('felt like you were going to hurt her') and Abby-behavioral-model linking ('because Abby does it'). Child's stated emotional state weaponized as harm corroboration. ARC-RF04-001-S60 overlap.

compound_patterns.summary: RF-04 (Emotional Manipulation) + RF-15 (False Allegations) + RF-11 (Inappropriate Child Involvement): RF-04 (Sev-2: multi-allegation child relay as emotional manipulation weapon; Abby-as-harmful-actor framing; ADD-002 'asshole' ROW-9750; DARVO ROW-9751; ARC-RF04-001-S60; ARC-RF04-002-S19) + RF-15 (vaping exposure + physical threat + harm-fear allegations relayed through child; 'felt like you were going to hurt her'; DARVO ROW-9751 — Eli's denial reframed as suspicious defensiveness) + RF-11 (Olivia positioned as harm-reporter; child's stated fear amplified and weaponized; Abby-behavioral-model linking places Olivia in role of verifying Eli/Abby conduct). Structural parallel: COMP-RF04-017 (B-019 Sep 15 choking claim, RF-04+RF-15+RF-11). New elements: (1) Abby-as-harmful-actor framing extends to Abby pinching/laughing-at-distress; (2) vaping-as-harm vector (child has asthma); (3) 'thought you'd do it because Abby does it' links Eli's alleged threat to Abby's established conduct.

cp3_item.summary: Jun 7-8 COMP-RF04-021 (RF-04+RF-15+RF-11): Sev-2 child relay harm allegation cluster. Notable for: (1) Physical-harm allegation trajectory continues: Sep 15 B-019 choking → Jun 7 B-025 vaping/threat/harm-fear — 9 months later, same mechanism (child relay post-Eli-custody), new modalities; (2) NEW Abby-as-harmful-actor vector: 'Abby laughed at her for coughing' + 'Abby pinches Milo' + 'thought you'd do it because Abby does it' — first time Abby is framed as the behavioral model for Eli's alleged harm rather than as obstacle/predatory-relationship subject; (3) May 27 car-safety fear relay (ROW-9692-9693): Olivia asking for location tracking because 'dad always crashing his cars' — new vehicle-danger framing sub-pattern; watch for recurrence; (4) B-025 is Phase A/B boundary batch — this cluster may indicate trajectory shift toward more severe harm-allegation pattern in Phase B.
